allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/vacancies?profileId=2190ca1d-0cd5-4707-bbaf-2ddf1b618579&minScore=30&page=0&size=200"; "matched=$\($r.totalElements\)"; $r.content | Group-Object sourceId | Sort-Object Count -Descending | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/vacancies?profileId=2190ca1d-0cd5-4707-bbaf-2ddf1b618579&minScore=30&page=0&size=300"; "java matches total=$\($r.totalElements\)"; $r.content | Group-Object sourceId | Sort-Object Count -Descending | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" }; '---'; $li = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/vacancies?sourceId=linkedin&page=0&size=5"; $li.content | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.relevanceScore ?? $_.score\) | $\($_.title\)" })

PowerShell(Invoke-RestMethod -Method PATCH "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/sources/justjoinit/toggle" | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-WebRequest -Method POST -Uri http://localhost:8080/api/v1/crawler/run -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode)

PowerShell($p = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8080/api/v1/profiles; $p | Select-Object id, name | Format-Table; $v = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/vacancies?page=0&size=1"; "total: $\($v.totalElements\)")
PowerShell($v = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/vacancies?minScore=90&page=0&size=5"; $v.content | Select-Object title, status | Format-Table)
PowerShell($s = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8080/api/v1/sources; \($s | Where-Object { $_.name -eq 'Wellfound' }\) | Select-Object id, name, enabled, active | Format-List)

PowerShell($logs = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/crawler/logs?page=0&size=10"; if \($logs.content\) { $logs.content | Select-Object sourceId, startedAt, status, vacanciesFound | Format-Table } else { $logs | Select-Object -First 10 | Format-Table })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; $p = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess; "$\($p.Id\) $\($p.ProcessName\) $\($p.Path\)")

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Method POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/crawler/run -UseBasicParsing } catch { "status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) body: $\(\(New-Object IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.Content.ReadAsStream\(\)\)\).ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })
